pull.title: support cutlass fp4 kernel in sm120
pull.body: ## Motivation Add SM120 (GeForce RTX 50 series) support to the existing SM100/SM103 implementation for NVFP4 quantization. ## Modifications - Added SM120-Specific cutlass kernel in sgl-kernel: cutlass_scaled_fp4_mm, cutlass_fp4_group_mm. - Added SM120/SM121 support in nvfp4_quant, nvfp4_export_quant. - Updated is_blackwell() function: Now returns true for both compute capability 10.0 and 12.0 - Restored original function naming: Changed from is_sm100_supported() to is_blackwell() in modelopt_quant.py ## Accuracy Tests run by: ``` SGLANG_USE_CUTLASS_BACKEND_FOR_FP4_GEMM=1 python3 -m sglang.launch_server --model-path nvidia/DeepSeek-V3-0324-FP4 --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --quantization modelopt_fp4 --tp 8 --disable-cuda-graph --speculative-algorithm=EAGLE --disable-radix-cache --attention-backend flashinfer python3 benchmark/gsm8k/bench_sglang.py --num-shots 8 --num-questions 1319 --parallel 1319 ``` gsm8k： Accuracy: 0.942 Invalid: 0.000 Latency: 523.908 s Output throughput: 273.355 token/s ## Benchmarking and Profiling ## Checklist

repo.name: sglang
repo.description: SGLang is a fast serving framework for large language models and vision language models.

repo.name: sglang
repo.description: SGLang is a high-performance serving framework for large language models and multimodal models.

files.patch:
@@ -16,13 +16,38 @@ limitations under the License.
 #include <torch/all.h>
 
 #if defined ENABLE_NVFP4 && ENABLE_NVFP4
-void cutlass_scaled_fp4_mm_sm100a(
+void cutlass_scaled_fp4_mm_sm100a_sm120a(
     torch::Tensor& D,
     torch::Tensor const& A,
     torch::Tensor const& B,
     torch::Tensor const& A_sf,
     torch::Tensor const& B_sf,
     torch::Tensor const& alpha);
+
+// SM120 specific dispatch functions
+void cutlass_fp4_bf16_gemm_dispatch_sm120(
+    torch::Tensor& D,
+    torch::Tensor const& A,
+    torch::Tensor const& B,
+    torch::Tensor const& A_sf,
+    torch::Tensor const& B_sf,
+    torch::Tensor const& alpha,
+    int m,
+    int n,
+    int k,
+    cudaStream_t stream);
+
+void cutlass_fp4_f16_gemm_dispatch_sm120(
+    torch::Tensor& D,
+    torch::Tensor const& A,
+    torch::Tensor const& B,
+    torch::Tensor const& A_sf,
+    torch::Tensor const& B_sf,
+    torch::Tensor const& alpha,
+    int m,
+    int n,
+    int k,
+    cudaStream_t stream);
 #endif
 
 void cutlass_scaled_fp4_mm(
@@ -33,7 +58,7 @@ void cutlass_scaled_fp4_mm(
     torch::Tensor const& B_sf,
     torch::Tensor const& alpha) {
 #if defined ENABLE_NVFP4 && ENABLE_NVFP4
-  return cutlass_scaled_fp4_mm_sm100a(D, A, B, A_sf, B_sf, alpha);
+  return cutlass_scaled_fp4_mm_sm100a_sm120a(D, A, B, A_sf, B_sf, alpha);
 #endif
   TORCH_CHECK_NOT_IMPLEMENTED(false, "No compiled nvfp4 mm kernel.");
 }
